data_notes: This 1500m extended context file supplements the primary 1000m analysis. The Nob Hill / Northwest District's walkability remains exceptional at 10/10 across both radii. The 1500m radius captures additional retail and dining options along the broader NW 23rd Avenue commercial corridor and nearby Pearl District green spaces.
